title: The End Update
description: The Mod that updates The End in a Vannila-Style Way
body:
Is the End... Boring?

Well... Not anymore!, with this mod, the end feels other place, it feels like a whole new dimension... This mod adds 7 new mobs, 3 new ores, 2 new woods & stone types and so much more, but lets get into the interesting part, The Biomes, this mod adds 4 new biomes to the end, some being rarer than others

1 - The Poison Forest is a peaceful biome, with a unique purple wood type, in this biome, there is an abundance of Chestlings, that you can store up to 18 Items in their Inventory

2 - The Fungus Forest is a peaceful biome as well, a biome which has well... lots of mushrooms, the biome is very inhabitated, but, it has a vibrant blue wood color


3 - The Shadow Meadows Is not an peaceful biome, you can see this in the name, has flowers that give you a Blindness effect, and it has a new stone type, that can be obtained by smelting Shadow Shroomlights, in this biome, the Shadow Monster Lives here, so you've better be carefull, he is very strong, but can drop an item that came from the true darkness...

 

4 - Crystal Desert a peaceful biome too, it has a bunch of fossils, just like in the soul sand valley in the nether, as the name says, it has Crystals, which are very fragile, but it can be crafted into a fully new Stone type that circles around an raimbow-type of color

5- The Ores: Find in the depths of the void, Enderite, an New ore to follow netherite, it needs to be blown 3 times to be mined, smelted, and forged with diamonds to get the actual ingot, that you can use to upgrade netherite tools, Uranium, one of the most ussefull ores in this mod, it can be used to craft it's block, torch, and even a nuke

6- Structures: Find an End castle! which has a very good loot on it, containing diamonds, ores, armor trims, and the Smithing Template to upgrade Netherite tools to Enderite.

7- There is so much more to explore! this mod adds more than 300 unique things to Minecraft, go collect them all!

This was a HUGE inspiration from the Enderite Mod, made by pitti11, and Better End, by Quiqueck, MIT License
